Automorphic Forms and QFT
← BACK
Seminar Talk TALK 2026.04.06

Automorphic Forms and QFT

This note organizes a seminar talk on possible contact points between automorphic forms and quantum field theory.

The central problem is the translation between representation-theoretic language and physical intuition.

It also briefly mentions analogies between Eisenstein series and partition functions.
